backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the DroneWash Dashboard backend, defining all core data types (Job, Expense, Quote, Invoice, Contract, etc.) and persistent state with access control for a drone washing business management system.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed, used for build/CI feature tracking.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary file describing the purpose and key features of each frontend source file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the DroneWash QuotePro Admin Dashboard React app, mounting the app at the #root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component handling Internet Identity authentication, user profile setup, theme support, React Query configuration with retry/caching logic, and lazy-loaded Dashboard rendering.
frontend/src/components/AddFundTransacti: Modal dialog component for adding inflow or outflow transactions to a specific fund, with form validation and backend mutation via useAddFundTransaction hook.
frontend/src/components/AddGoalDialog.ts: Modal dialog component for creating new business goals with description, target metrics, target date, and optional milestone tracking fields, submitting via the useAddGoal mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/AddInvestmentTra: A dialog component for adding investment fund transactions (payments or allocations) with fields for amount, transaction type, allocation type, and description. Submits via the `useAddInvestmentFundTransaction` mutation and shows toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/AddMaintenanceEx: A dialog component for logging maintenance expenses that first creates an expense record then adds a corresponding ledger entry to deduct from the maintenance fund balance. Validates sufficient fund balance before submission and invalidates related React Query caches on success.
Renders memoized bar and line charts for monthly revenue/expenses and profit projections using Recharts and data from custom query hooks. Includes error handling with a retry button and loading state management.
frontend/src/components/ArchivedInvestme: A static informational component that replaces the old archived investments UI with a notice directing users to the new Investment Fund system. Provides a navigation button that switches to the investment fund tab.
frontend/src/components/BackupVersionsDi: A dialog that lists locally stored backup versions with options to download (as JSON) or delete each version. Displays version metadata including timestamp and estimated file size.
frontend/src/components/COGSSettings.tsx: A settings panel for configuring Cost of Goods Sold parameters such as van fuel rates by city, generator fuel rate, additional pilot fee, and chemicals cost per hour. Saves configuration to localStorage and shows a save button only when there are unsaved changes.
frontend/src/components/ContractsManagem: A full CRUD management UI for contracts, allowing admins to create, edit, delete, and filter contracts by name/status, with support for standardized services, area tiers, and agreed pricing.
frontend/src/components/CreateFundDialog: A dialog form for creating a new financial fund with fields for fund type, name, initial balance, spending limit, and approval threshold.
frontend/src/components/DataEntryForms.t: Provides forms and tables for adding, editing, and deleting jobs and expenses, with inline edit/delete dialogs and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/DataMigrationHan: Handles one-time migration of jobs, expenses, quotes, invoices, and goals from localStorage to the backend, showing progress and errors in a dialog.
frontend/src/components/DeleteConfirmDia: A reusable alert dialog component that prompts the user to confirm a delete action, with a loading state during deletion.
frontend/src/components/EditExpenseDialo: A dialog form for editing an existing expense's amount, date, category, and additional info, submitting updates via the useUpdateExpense hook.
frontend/src/components/EditFundDialog.t: A dialog component for editing an existing fund's name, balance, spending limit, approval threshold, and active status, using the useUpdateFund mutation with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/EditJobDialog.ts: A dialog component for editing a job's client name, revenue, date, and sector, using the useUpdateJob mutation with toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/components/ErrorPanel.tsx: A reusable card component that displays an error message with an optional retry button using a destructive alert style.
frontend/src/components/ExpensesManageme: A full expense management UI with search, category filtering, bulk selection, edit/delete actions, and a summary of total filtered expenses displayed in a table.
frontend/src/components/FinancialMetrics: Displays key financial metrics (revenue, profit, fund balances) as expandable metric cards with fund editing and transaction dialogs, using memoized calculations for performance.
A tabbed funds management page showing operational funds, transactions, transfers, and alerts, with support for creating, editing, deleting funds, adding transactions, and attaching PDFs.
frontend/src/components/InvestmentFundMa: Displays an investment fund overview with summary cards (initial capital, current balance, total payments, total allocations) and a transaction history table. Admins can add new transactions via a dialog.
Provides a form to create a customer invoice by selecting an approved quote and entering customer details, then generates and downloads a PDF upon successful creation.
frontend/src/components/InvoicesList.tsx: Lists all invoices in a filterable, searchable table with options to download PDFs, toggle paid/pending status, and delete invoices (admin-only for delete).
frontend/src/components/JobCalendar.tsx: Renders a monthly calendar view of scheduled jobs, allowing navigation between months and clicking a job to open a details dialog.
frontend/src/components/JobDetailsDialog: A dialog for viewing and editing job details (customer info, financial figures) that restricts editing to admin users and submits updates via the useUpdateJob mutation.
frontend/src/components/KPIWidgets.tsx: Displays four KPI cards (Net Profit Trend, Job Completion, VAT Due, and a fund delta) by computing metrics from financial, jobs, and invoices query data.
frontend/src/components/LoadingPanel.tsx: A simple card component that shows a spinning loader and a configurable message while data is being fetched.
frontend/src/components/MaintenanceManag: Renders a maintenance management section with fund balance, total inflow/outflow cards, an expense table, and an admin-only button to log new maintenance expenses via a dialog.
frontend/src/components/MobileNav.tsx: A slide-out sheet navigation menu for mobile screens that lists all app tabs and conditionally includes a Settings item for admins.
frontend/src/components/MonthlyReports.t: Displays a monthly financial report with month/year selectors, summary metrics, goals tracking, and CSV export/print functionality.
frontend/src/components/PricingManagemen: Admin panel for viewing and editing tiered service rates for five cleaning service types, with save functionality that batches updates via the setServiceRate mutation.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupDial: A modal dialog that collects a new user's name, email, and role (admin or viewer) on first launch and passes the data to a parent callback.
A React component that provides a multi-step quote calculator for cleaning services, computing pricing tiers, COGS breakdowns (fuel, chemicals, pilot costs), VAT, volume discounts, and add-ons, then saving the quote via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/QuotesList.tsx: A React component that displays, filters, and manages saved quotes with search/filter controls, cost breakdown calculations, and PDF export options for both client-facing and internal views.
frontend/src/components/ReportingSection: A React component that shows unit economics summaries and provides buttons to export cash flow and unit economics reports as CSV or PDF using job and expense data.
frontend/src/components/UserPreferencesD: A dialog component that lets users configure dashboard preferences (dark mode, layout, metric filters) and persists them via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context backed by the DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/usePdfAttachments.ts: Provides frontend-only IndexedDB utilities (savePdf, getPdf, deletePdf, hasAttachment) for storing and retrieving PDF attachments keyed by transaction ID for Quotations Fund transactions.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations (jobs, expenses, quotes, invoices, funds, contracts, user profiles, preferences, backups, etc.) using the ICP actor, with BigInt serialization helpers and configurable stale times.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, charts, etc.).
frontend/src/lib/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates customer-facing quote PDFs by opening a new browser window with styled HTML and triggering the print dialog, using browser-native APIs without any external PDF library.
frontend/src/lib/reportGenerator.ts: Generates cash flow reports from jobs and expenses data as either a downloadable CSV file or a printable HTML/PDF opened in a new browser window.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main authenticated dashboard page that renders tabbed navigation across all app sections (overview, funds, analytics, reports, settings, etc.) and handles data preloading, backup, and role-based access control.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Renders a login page with an Internet Identity authentication button for the DroneWash QuotePro admin dashboard. Handles login state and displays error toasts on failure.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers. Includes a function to remove sensitive parameters from the URL hash without page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius variables, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 7) for an expense/fund management app, documenting an in-progress frontend-only PDF attachment feature using IndexedDB for Quotations Fund transactions. Records known issues including build resource limits and backend connection failures.
